narrative:
West Chester Twp 24 (precinct in Butler County) has 872 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.2%, a clear Republican lean of 7.5 percentage points.
